job_scores.reasoning: Exceptional fit. Candidate has production AI experience at YC startup building multi-channel AI agents with Claude, RAG, and LLM validation. Shipped features across 1,000+ orders with measurable impact. Internship Matcher project shows deep Claude pipeline expertise (Haiku/Sonnet dual-model, 95%+ accuracy). Real-world AI deployment experience rare for undergrad.

Strong match. Full-stack experience at YC startup with React/Python across 7 enterprise clients. Built scalable systems (webhooks, multi-channel integrations). Location match (San Jose). Demonstrated ability to ship production features. Lacks specific TikTok-scale distributed systems experience but has solid foundation.

Moderate fit. Has some DevOps exposure (AWS S3, Redis, PostgreSQL deployment) but limited infrastructure-specific experience. Grafana dashboard work shows monitoring awareness. Lacks deep Kubernetes, CI/CD pipeline, or platform engineering experience that DevOps roles typically require.

Decent fit. Infrastructure experience through multi-tier data layers (PostgreSQL, Redis, S3), async processing (ARQ), and WebSocket systems. Built scalable backends handling 1,000+ orders. However, lacks specialized infrastructure tooling (Kubernetes, Terraform) and monitoring systems beyond Grafana dashboards.

Near-perfect fit. Extensive production AI engineering: Claude-based agents at Burnt (1,000+ orders), dual-model pipeline with 95%+ accuracy, RAG implementation, LLM validation layers. Sleep-PSG project shows ML fundamentals (Scikit-Learn, 83% accuracy). Remote-friendly location. Demonstrates both AI theory and production deployment.

Good fit for FDSE role requiring client-facing technical work. Burnt experience shows enterprise client interaction (7 clients), building tools for non-technical stakeholders, and shipping production features. Strong full-stack skills. However, lacks government/defense domain experience Palantir often values. Location mismatch (DC vs CA).

Excellent backend fit. Built multiple production backends: FastAPI at Burnt handling 1,000+ orders, Internship Matcher with PostgreSQL/Redis/S3 multi-tier architecture, async EEG pipeline with distributed processing. Location match (San Jose). Demonstrates scalability focus (52% latency reduction, parallel processing).
skill_gaps: Specific backend frameworks if not Python-based
